item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description:
What's New in 1.0.9

Smarter Audio Device Recovery

  • Smart device fallback with priority ordering — saved device, system default, built-in mic, then other devices
  • Detects Bluetooth disconnections that don't change the default device
  • Device health checks prevent fallback to unhealthy devices
  • Recovery now escalates instead of giving up after 3 attempts
  • CoreAudio negotiation moved off main thread to prevent UI freezes

Onboarding & Licensing

  • Language selection and model download steps in onboarding
  • Paywall view with trial badge
  • Privacy toggle switches consistently aligned

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed audio engine -10877 errors on device switch
  • Fixed Swift concurrency warnings and deprecated API usage
  • UI improvements to menu bar, notification cards, and settings
